( Site tail, Site head, Link link) Construct a new connector with the given tail and head for the specified link. The head and tail sites may be representative sites for multiport, in which case they are not necessarily the ones returned by ge

they are not necessarily the ones returned by getHeadSite() or getTailSite(). Those methods will return new sites as needed to ensure that each each connection is to its own site. Parameters: tail - The tail site. head - The head site. link
